fields.Name: Run Record Process
fields.Description: Runs a MJ: Record Processes definition against a runtime scope (selected records, a view, a list, or a filter), optionally as a dry-run. Thin wrapper over the RecordProcessExecutor engine — the agent / workflow / low-code surface for the same bulk-update capability the Record Process Runner UX drives. For WorkType=FieldRules, a dry-run computes the exact per-record field diff without writing.

fields.Name: RecordProcessID
fields.Description: ID of the MJ: Record Processes definition to run.

fields.Name: Scope
fields.Description: Optional JSON-string runtime scope override: {"Kind":"records","RecordIDs":[...]} | {"Kind":"view","ViewID":"..."} | {"Kind":"list","ListID":"..."} | {"Kind":"filter","Filter":"..."}. Omit to use the process's stored Scope.

fields.Name: DryRun
fields.Description: When true, compute the per-record changes without writing (FieldRules work type). Defaults to false.

fields.Name: ProcessRunID
fields.Description: ID of the persisted MJ: Process Runs row for this run (read MJ: Process Run Details for per-record outcomes/diffs).

fields.Name: Processed
fields.Description: Number of records the run touched.

fields.Name: Succeeded
fields.Description: Number of records that succeeded (in dry-run, records with a computed preview).

fields.Name: Skipped
fields.Description: Number of records skipped (no rule matched / nothing changed).
The run ended with a non-completed status (see Message).
The Scope parameter was not valid JSON.
An unexpected error occurred while running the process.
